zh.Atherton, Lancashire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿瑟頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Atherton I, Knight於1325年出生在英國藍卡爾阿瑟頓時，他的父親Henry de Atherton45歲，母親Emma De Aintree52歲。他於1344年與Lady Jane or Joan Moberley在英國爾莫波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1396年在他的家鄉享年72歲。

zh-hans.Atherton, Lancashire, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰藍卡爾阿瑟頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Atherton I, Knight于1325年出生在英国藍卡爾阿瑟頓时，他的父亲Henry de Atherton45岁，母亲Emma De Aintree52岁。他于1344年与Lady Jane or Joan Moberley在英国爾莫波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1396年在他的家乡享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Atherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place near Manchester named Atherton, from the Old English personal name Æthelhere + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.
English: habitational name from Hatherton, Staffordshire, from Old English haguthorn + dūn ‘the hill where hawthorn grows’.

English (East Anglia): topographic name from Middle English at ther doune ‘(dweller) on the hill’ (Old English æt thǣre dūne). Through confusion of -don and -ton, Attherdoune was altered to Atherton, Adderton, and Atterton.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Atherton I, Knight was born in 1325, in Atherton, Lancashire, England, his father, Henry de Atherton, was 45 and his mother, Emma De Aintree, was 52. He married Lady Jane or Joan Moberley in 1344, in Mobberley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1396, in his hometown, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Atherton I, Knight est né en 1325, à Atherton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Atherton, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Emma De Aintree, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane or Joan Moberley en 1344, à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Atherton I, Knight 1325 in Atherton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Atherton 45 und seine Mutter Emma De Aintree 52. Er hat 1344 in Mobberley, Cheshire, England Lady Jane or Joan Moberley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1396 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Atherton I, Knight è nato il nel 1325 nel Atherton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Atherton, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Emma De Aintree, aveva 52 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jane or Joan Moberley nel 1344, nel Mobberley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Atherton I, Knightが1325年にイギリスランカシュアイアアスエルトンで生まれた時，父Henry de Athertonは45歳，母Emma De Aintreeは52歳であった。1344年にイギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーでLady Jane or Joan Moberleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1396年に故郷で72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Atherton I, Knight(이)가 1325년 영국 랭카실르 앳헤르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Atherton(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma De Aintree(은)는 52세였다. 그는 1344년 영국 체실르 모브벌리에서 Lady Jane or Joan Moberley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1396년 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Atherton, Lancashire, England, United Ki: Atherton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Atherton I, Knight nasceu em 1325, em Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Atherton, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Emma De Aintree, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jane or Joan Moberley em 1344, em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Atherton I, Knight родился в 1325 г. в местности атиртон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Atherton было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma De Aintree, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane or Joan Moberley в 1344 г. в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1396 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Atherton I, Knight nació en 1325, en Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Atherton, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Emma De Aintree, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Lady Jane or Joan Moberley en 1344, en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1396, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años.
